com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class InputAccount

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount

  • public class InputAccount
extends FullIntegrationBase
    This is used to communicate with service to read account information.
    Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  InputAccount.CardEventListener
      Listener for Card Event.
      static class  InputAccount.CustomMACInformation 
      static interface  InputAccount.EnterSecurityCallBack 
      static interface  InputAccount.InputAccountCallback
      Call back from POS Service for input account command.
      static class  InputAccount.InputAccountCallbackCompat
      This class is an abstract class that implements InputAccountCallback.
      static class  InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
      The request data for input account command.
      static class  InputAccount.InputAccountResponse
      The response data of input account command.
      static class  InputAccount.InputAreaParams 
      static interface  InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback 
      static interface  InputAccount.ProcessingMessageUpdateCallback
      Used to indicate the processing message change
      static interface  InputAccount.ReportStatusListener
      Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when terminal reported integer status.

    • Constructor Detail

      • InputAccount

        public InputAccount()

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static InputAccount getInstance()

      • inputAccountWithEMV

        public static void inputAccountWithEMV(Context context,
                                       InputAccount.InputAccountRequest request,
                                       CommSetting commSetting,
                                       <any> posLinkCallback,
                                       InputAccount.InputAccountCallback inputAccountCallback)

        This is a wrapper to use PosLink to do communication with ManageRequest.TransType = 24, INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV.
        Used to get account input with card and EMV supported.

        When inputAccountCallback is non null and commSetting is AIDL, that means the POS Service runs on same device as yours.
        You will need to handle the UI display and use handleInputAccount(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CardEventListener) handleInputCardNum(java.lang.String, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback)} or handleInputExpiry(java.lang.String, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback) to finish following steps.

        Parameters:
        context - App context
        request - input account request
        commSetting - Communication Setting
        posLinkCallback - NonNull. You need to handle start and finish.
        inputAccountCallback - Nullable. Call back from POS Service.

      • abort

        public boolean abort()
        Returns:
        whether abort success. In some steps you cannot abort.

      • sendInputArea

        public boolean sendInputArea(int width,
                             int height,
                             int offsetX,
                             int offsetY)
        Send the input area to BroadPOS, and display the input area by BroadPOS. (only Android)
        Only support InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart() and InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV()
        Parameters:
        width - Input area width
        height - Input area height
        offsetX - Input area offset from the X axis
        offsetY - Input area offset from the Y axis
        Returns:
        true - BroadPOS support
        false - BroadPOS not support

      • sendInputArea

        public boolean sendInputArea(InputAccount.InputAreaParams inputAreaParams)
        Send the input area to BroadPOS, and display the input area by BroadPOS. (only Android)
        Only support InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart() and InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV()
        Parameters:
        inputAreaParams - Input area params.
        Returns:
        true - BroadPOS support
        false - BroadPOS not support

      • sendInputArea

        public boolean sendInputArea(InputAccount.InputAreaParams inputAreaParams,
                             InputAccount.EnterSecurityCallBack enterSecurityCallBack)
        Send the input area to BroadPOS, and display the input area by BroadPOS. (only Android)
        Only support InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart() and InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV()
        Parameters:
        inputAreaParams - Input area params.
        enterSecurityCallBack - Enter Security CallBack.
        Returns:
        true - BroadPOS support
        false - BroadPOS not support

      • hideInputArea

        public boolean hideInputArea()
        Together with sendInputArea(int, int, int, int)
        Hide the input area.
        Returns:
        true - BroadPOS support
        false - BroadPOS not support

      • resumeInputArea

        public boolean resumeInputArea()
        Together with sendInputArea(int, int, int, int)
        Resume the input area.
        Returns:
        true - BroadPOS support
        false - BroadPOS not support

      • handleInputCardNum

        public void handleInputCardNum(java.lang.String cardNum,
                               FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart()
        You may call this to replace handleInputAccount(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CardEventListener) after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart().
        Parameters:
        cardNum - The card number you get. It will returned back in response.
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • handleInputCardNum

        public void handleInputCardNum(java.lang.String cardNum,
                               InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback inputCardNumCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart()
        You may call this to replace handleInputAccount(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CardEventListener) after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart().
        Parameters:
        cardNum - The card number you get. It will returned back in response.
        inputCardNumCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • handleInputAccount

        public void handleInputAccount(FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback,
                               InputAccount.CardEventListener cardEventListener)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart()
        You must call this right after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onInputAccountStart() to receive input result.
        Parameters:
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • handleInputZip

        public void handleInputZip(java.lang.String zip,
                           FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterZip()
        You must call this after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterZip() to send input result.
        Parameters:
        zip - Zip code.
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • handleWarnRemoveCard

        public void handleWarnRemoveCard(FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onWarnRemoveCard() You must call this after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onWarnRemoveCard().
        Parameters:
        currentStepCallback - call back for remove card finish success or not.

      • handleInputCVV

        public void handleInputCVV(java.lang.String cvv,
                           FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV()
        You must call this after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV() to send input result.
        Parameters:
        cvv - CVV
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • skipInputCVV

        public boolean skipInputCVV(FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        This method is suitable for directly ignoring the value in the safe input area, directly by pass enter CVV. If you want to know whether BroadPOS supports this method, call isSupportSkipInputCVV()

        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV()
        You must call this after InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterCVV() to send input result.

        Parameters:
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.
        Returns:
        Return whether it success.

      • isSupportSkipInputCVV

        public boolean isSupportSkipInputCVV()
        Returns whether BroadPOS supports skipInputCVV.
        If BroadPOS is not connected, it will return false

      • handleInputExpiry

        public void handleInputExpiry(java.lang.String value,
                              FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onEnterExpiryDate()
        Parameters:
        value - The expiry date with MMYY format. It will returned back in response.
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • handleSelectEMVApp

        public void handleSelectEMVApp(java.lang.String value,
                               FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onSelectEMVApp(List)
        Select EMV App when doing EMV process.
        Parameters:
        value - One of the value from InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onSelectEMVApp(List)
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • handleProcessing

        public void handleProcessing(InputAccount.ProcessingMessageUpdateCallback processingMessageUpdateCallback,
                             FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallback.onProcessing(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Used to receive processing finished or not.
        Parameters:
        processingMessageUpdateCallback - This indicates the message changed
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • handleSelectLanguage

        public void handleSelectLanguage(FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback currentStepCallback)
        Together with InputAccount.InputAccountCallbackCompat.onSelectLanguage(String)
        Select Language.
        Parameters:
        currentStepCallback - call back for current step success or not.

      • setReportStatusListener

        public void setReportStatusListener(InputAccount.ReportStatusListener reportStatusListener)
        Register a callback to be invoked when terminal reported integer status.

        Need to set InputAccount.InputAccountRequest.reportStatus to 1
        Parameters:
        reportStatusListener - ReportStatusListener
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • unregisterAll

        protected void unregisterAll()
        Overrides:
        unregisterAll in class FullIntegrationBase
